reviews.comment:
Hay horas del día q hay q tener paciencia para pasar al baño

(Translated by Google)
There are times of day when you have to be patient to get to the bathroom
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURka3VUWGlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Largas colas para cada surtidor, cuando por fin nos tocó era "el cambio de turno del empleado", el que lo reemplazó tardó 10 minutos en llegar, no andaba el posnet, otros 10 minutos para arreglarlo, cosa que no ocurrió. Nos derivó a otro; en fin, nadie se disculpó. Resumiendo, la atención no es buena.

(Translated by Google)
Long lines for every pump. When it was finally our turn, it was "the employee's shift change." The replacement took 10 minutes to arrive, the card reader wasn't working, and it took another 10 minutes to fix it, which never happened. He sent us to another pump; in short, no one apologized. The service is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkcU91NXdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una vieja panadería transformada en restaurante - museo. Da gusto comer allí. Precios acordes y buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
An old bakery transformed into a restaurant-museum. It's a pleasure to eat there. Reasonable prices and good service.

reviews.comment:
Malitimo. No pude cargar agua para el termo. Una fila lentísima para todo. El mismo empleado es cajero,  hace los cafes, calienta las medialunas...y para entregarle $100 para el agua ...

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. I couldn't get water for the thermos. The line was incredibly slow for everything. The same employee was the cashier, made the coffee, heated the croissants... and to give him $100 for the water...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkbEx6Zk5nEAE
